articles.title: Coal India arm CMPDI IPO opens for subscription. Check brokerages review, GMP and other details
articles.description: Central Mine Planning and Design Institute Ltd (CMPDI) is set to launch its IPO on March 20, with a modest 2% grey market premium indicating a steady debut. The Rs 1,842 crore offer for sale, priced between Rs 163-172, will not raise fresh capital for the company.

articles.title: 'Crude Is Still Rude': From Tata Motors to M&M, CLSA Trims Targets Across Auto Stocks
articles.description: If elevated oil prices persist, the brokerage warns of a potential 3040% earnings correction, in line with past periods of prolonged demand slowdown and cost pressures.

articles.title: Five Stocks To Buy: Bharti Airtel, ONGC, Chennai Petro, Ather Energy And Balrampur Chini
articles.description: Top picks include telecom giant Bharti Airtel, state-run energy explorer ONGC, oil refiner Chennai Petroleum Corporation, EV manufacturer Ather Energy, among others.

articles.title: How a navy officer's daily workout exposed French aircraft carrier's location

topStories.title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: First EVM, VVPAT randomisation conducted ahead of Assam Assembly polls
topStories.description: In Odisha, Congress MLA C.S. Raazen Ekka said that the party has filed a petition before the Assembly Speaker seeking the disqualification of three of its MLAs, including Dasarathi Gamango and Sofia Firdous, for alleged cross-voting in the recent Rajya Sabha elections

topStories.title: Oil Slips To $107 As US, Israel Signal De-Escalation In Middle East Tensions
topStories.description: Brent prices have surged nearly 50% this month, reflecting the global nature of the disruption. In contrast, WTI has lagged, weighed down by US-specific dynamics.

dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent broached waiving sanctions on oil already at sea, which would be a stunning reversal of longstanding American policy.

dailyNews.description: “This is a very volatile world,” Trump said from the Oval Office. “The emergency spending would be a very small price to pay to ensure the nation’s military stays in top shape.”

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Pearl Harbor comment leaves Japan PM Takaichi speechless | Watch Video
dailyNews.description: Responding to a question on why allies were not informed in advance, Trump emphasised the element of surprise in military operations. “We wanted surprise. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?” Trump said.

dailyNews.title: Airfares on US airlines have shot up due to the war with Iran, as jet fuel costs rise, but travel demand remains strong
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel’s war in Iran has pushed airlines to raise fares amid soaring jet fuel costs and airspace disruptions. Despite higher prices, travel demand remains strong, with rising ticket values and multiple record sales days reported by major US carriers.

dailyNews.title: Missing University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey found dead in Barcelona
dailyNews.description: The body of University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey, 20, was recovered at Port Olimpic in Barcelona after a days-long search, his family confirmed.

dailyNews.description: In a caustic critique of the court issued on social media late Sunday night, the president inadvertently buttressed its independence.

dailyNews.title: Federal commission made up of Trump appointees approves design of his gold coin
dailyNews.description: The vote by the U.S. Commission of Fine Arts, whose members are supporters of the president and were appointed by him earlier this year, was without objection.

dailyNews.title: Father of service member killed in Iran war said he never told Pete Hegseth to 'finish' the job
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and President Donald Trump have said the families of service members who died in the Iran war told them to finish the job.

dailyNews.title: Former FBI Director Comey subpoenaed in Trump-appointed prosecutor’s conspiracy probe
dailyNews.description: Former FBI Director James Comey has been subpoenaed in connection with an investigation being run by a Trump-appointed U.S. attorney. NBC News’ Ryan Reilly explains the probe dubbed the “grand conspiracy” investigation.

dailyNews.title: Some DHS contractors told White House officials they were asked to pay Corey Lewandowski
dailyNews.description: Some companies complained to the Trump administration that Lewandowski has stood to personally profit from the DHS contracting process. Lewandowski denies the allegations.

dailyNews.title: U.S. gold coin with image of Trump gets approved by president's hand-picked panel
dailyNews.description: The Commission of Fine Arts approved a 24-carat commemorative coin that features an image of President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump signals DOJ should continue Powell probe, complicating Warsh Fed nomination
dailyNews.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of investigating him in retaliation for his refusal to lower interest rates as much or as quickly as Trump has demanded.
